justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent initially asked for the year, which was a minor imprecision, but then accurately interpreted the user's subsequent date and time preferences.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent offered reasonable alternatives when the user's initial request was unavailable and successfully found a suitable slot.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent had one unnecessary question about the year at the beginning, but otherwise the conversation flowed efficiently.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly smooth and professional, with only a minor initial friction point regarding the year.
